title: Number Of Good Paths
description: Count paths in an undirected tree whose endpoint values are equal and no internal value is larger; single nodes count. Inputs use Python lists and integers; unless explicitly stated, callers need not preserve mutable inputs.
input_contract: Parameters in order: vals: list[int], edges: list[list[int]]. 1 <= n <= 30000; edges form a 0-indexed tree; values are positive and <= 100000.
output_contract: Return integer using exact comparison. Python integer arithmetic has no 32-bit overflow; array/query order is significant.
